title: Moldyfishy's Combat Additions [Ruzdîn Studios]
description: This mod implements New Additions towards the Combat and Tools Categories.
body:
**This mod adds the Alloyer which can create Alloys. There are 4 Materials added.
1. Vanilla Alloy Ingots:
-Enhanced Iron, Enhanced Gold and Enhanced Diamond

2. Non-Vanilla Alloy Ingots:
-Purple Gold, White Gold, Royal White Gold

For now its only these, but in the future there will be more. All of the Enhanced Materials are better than their Vanilla counterparts. And the Non-Vanilla Alloys are their own thing.

You can craft Tools, Weapons and Armor Sets with most of these materials.

There are 3 Overworld Ores added. Zinc, Nickel and Aluminium. Zinc is used to make rods for the new tools. Aluminium, Nickel are used for alloy recipes.

Summon points

By killing 50 mobs without dying you get 1 Summon point. You can press C to use that point to summon the Heart of Combat**
